prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约2542→2223→1798→1057→837，呈持续上升趋势（位次数字不断减小），近4年累计前移约1705名，2025年基准约837名。2 024年安徽省首年新高考后位次大幅前移，2025年继续小幅前移约220名；2021–2025年物理类（含理科）计划数分别为98→83→70→52→20，呈持续缩减趋势；2026 年计划16人，较2025年再缩减4人（-20%），缩招幅度较大，理论上竞争进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省，属东北地区，对安徽考生存在一定地域距离；但 学校层次高、品牌效应强，地域因素对顶尖考生影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次837名、2026年计划大幅缩招20%（竞争加剧）、软科排名持续上升（吸引力增强 ）、抖音高热（关注度提升）以及本省物理类考生基数略降等因素，预计2026年最低位次在前移趋势上继续小幅前移。预测最低位次约727名，区间640–814名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 2542 → 2223 → 1798 → 1057 → 837, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advancement of about 1705 places over the past 4 years, and a baseline of about 837 in 2025. In 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao in Anhui Province, the ranking advanced significantly, and in 2025, it continued to advance slightly by about 220 places. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category (including Science) were 98 → 83 → 70 → 52 → 20, showing a continuous reduction trend. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 16, a further reduction of 4 (-20%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant enrollment cut, theoretically intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, member of the C9 League. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 12th (Top 20), up from 14th in 2025 and 16th in 2024, showing a steady improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. It ranks 10th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, and the label of 'National Defense Seven Sons' strengthens its hardcore image, attracting high application attention. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line, but it has been digested. It has 17 A-/A/A+ disciplines including Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Instrument Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, etc., with top-tier engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region, which presents a certain geographical distance for Anhui candidates. However, due to the high level of the school and strong brand effect, geographical factors have limited impact on top candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 837, the significant 20% reduction in 2026 enrollment (intensified competition), the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (increased attractiveness), high Douyin popularity (increased attention), and a slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in the province, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to advance slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 727, with a range of 640–814.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 727, with a range of 640–814. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (640) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Academician Special Class/Top Class; candidates in the middle range (approximately 700–750) are advised to focus on Tier 2 AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit (814) are advised to focus on Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2, to ensure admission. Harbin Institute of Technology's significant enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifies competition. Candidates are advised to reasonably assess their own rankings and prioritize major directions that match their interests.
